about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a fullstack developer focused on backend and integrations for Bitrix24. I work with PHP (D7, Symfony), Python (FastAPI), Vue 3, and Docker.
about.description2: I have experience integrating with external services, automating business processes, Linux system administration, and building end-to-end solutions: from UI to backend logic and infrastructure.

items.title: Backend Development
items.description: Developing modules and components for Bitrix24 (on-premise), cloud applications. Also building chatbots, parsers, and LLM integrations.

items.title: Async Systems
items.description: Implementing background tasks, queues, and data processing with progress and status tracking (agents, queues).

items.title: Integrations
items.description: Integration with other CRMs, external APIs, bots, and third-party services.

items.title: Fullstack Development
items.description: Building interfaces with Vue 3 and connecting them to the backend.

items.title: Async Transcription System
items.description: Audio and video processing system with async task queue and real-time status updates

items.title: Bitrix24 Automation & Integration
items.description: Business process automation and Bitrix24 integration with external services

certs.title: Certificates
certs.disclaimer: Certificates confirm practical experience, but the main focus is on real projects

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.subtitle: Let's discuss your project
contacts.description: Ready to help with Bitrix24 integration and automation. Write to me in any convenient messenger — I'll respond within an hour.
